chemical_accuracy_threshold_kj.description: Chemical-accuracy threshold (1 kcal/mol) used as the transferability bound

reaction_count.description: Number of hydrogenation reactions in the frozen set

mean_abs_correlation_content_kj.description: Mean absolute correlation contribution to the reaction enthalpies

max_abs_correlation_content_kj.description: Largest absolute correlation contribution across the reaction set

pi_bond_correlation_transferability_gap_.description: Difference in per-C-C-pi-bond correlation contribution between the acetylene and ethylene rungs

cc_pi_rungs_within_chemical_accuracy.description: Whether the two single-C-C-pi-bond reaction residuals agree within the chemical-accuracy comparison scale

all_species_true_minima.description: Whether every optimized species had no imaginary vibrational mode

dh_ccsdt_acetylene_hydrogenation_kj.description: CCSD(T) reaction enthalpy at 298.15 K for C2H2 + H2 -> C2H4

correlation_content_acetylene_hydrogenat.description: Correlation contribution to the enthalpy (CCSD(T) - HF) for C2H2 + H2 -> C2H4

correlation_fraction_acetylene_hydrogena.description: Correlation contribution as a fraction of the CCSD(T) enthalpy for C2H2 + H2 -> C2H4

dh_ccsdt_ethylene_hydrogenation_kj.description: CCSD(T) reaction enthalpy at 298.15 K for C2H4 + H2 -> C2H6

correlation_content_ethylene_hydrogenati.description: Correlation contribution to the enthalpy (CCSD(T) - HF) for C2H4 + H2 -> C2H6

correlation_fraction_ethylene_hydrogenat.description: Correlation contribution as a fraction of the CCSD(T) enthalpy for C2H4 + H2 -> C2H6

dh_ccsdt_ammonia_synthesis_kj.description: CCSD(T) reaction enthalpy at 298.15 K for N2 + 3 H2 -> 2 NH3

correlation_content_ammonia_synthesis_kj.description: Correlation contribution to the enthalpy (CCSD(T) - HF) for N2 + 3 H2 -> 2 NH3

correlation_fraction_ammonia_synthesis.description: Correlation contribution as a fraction of the CCSD(T) enthalpy for N2 + 3 H2 -> 2 NH3

dh_ccsdt_methanol_synthesis_kj.description: CCSD(T) reaction enthalpy at 298.15 K for CO + 2 H2 -> CH3OH

correlation_content_methanol_synthesis_k.description: Correlation contribution to the enthalpy (CCSD(T) - HF) for CO + 2 H2 -> CH3OH

correlation_fraction_methanol_synthesis.description: Correlation contribution as a fraction of the CCSD(T) enthalpy for CO + 2 H2 -> CH3OH
